title: Workflow cannot be activated
symptom: The user is unable to activate a workflow despite successful execution. An error message indicates that the workflow cannot be activated.
applies_when: User attempts to activate the workflow
not_this_if: No changes made to the workflow
root_cause: This issue may arise from how the workflow is saved in n8n's memory. Sometimes, minor changes or duplicating the workflow can refresh its state and resolve activation issues.
fix_steps: Make a small change to the workflow and save it again.
If that doesn't work, duplicate the workflow, rename it, and save the new version.
Try to activate the duplicated workflow.
agent_instruction: Make a small change to the workflow and save it, or duplicate and rename it to activate.
